---
title: "Blog"
author: ""
description: "Roger Beecham's blog"
listing:
  - id: posts_2025
    contents: "2025/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posts_2024
    contents: "2024/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posts_2020
    contents: "2020/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posts_2018
    contents: "2018/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
title-block-banner: "#32251f"
---



<!-- ```{css, echo=FALSE}
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
``` -->

## 2025

:::{#posts_2025}
:::


## 2024

:::{#posts_2024}
:::


## 2020

:::{#posts_2020}
:::


## 2018

:::{#posts_2018}
:::
